_comment: StockGuru MCP Server configuration for Claude Desktop / Claude Code / Cowork

stockguru-market-data._description: Live Indian stock market data — prices, order book, candles, pre-spike detector

env._note: Credentials are loaded from stockguru/.env automatically

_setup_instructions.step1: Install MCP package: pip install mcp
_setup_instructions.step2: Add credentials to stockguru/.env (any one feed is enough)

step3_claude_desktop.mac: Copy the mcpServers block to: ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json
step3_claude_desktop.restart: Restart Claude Desktop — you will see StockGuru tools in the toolbar

step3_claude_code.command: Add to .claude.json in your project root or home directory
